step1.title: What kind of account you'd like to create?
step1.description: Select your account type to personalize your experience.
step1.individual_desc: Help us identify who you are within the research and innovation management ecosystem.
step1.institution_desc: Select the category that best describes your primary institution.
step1.no_institutions_found: No institutions found. You can continue with what you typed.

education_levels.Early-Career Researcher / Research manag: Early-Career Researcher / Research management professional (0 – 5 years post-qualification)
education_levels.Mid-Career Researcher / Research managem: Mid-Career Researcher / Research management professional (6 – 15 years)
education_levels.Senior Researcher / Research management: Senior Researcher / Research management professional (16+ years)

step2.title: Areas of Interest
step2.description: Select at least 3 areas that interest you the most.
step2.min_required: Please select at least 3 interests to continue

step3.title: Education and career
step3.description: Help us understand your background to provide more relevant scientific opportunities.

step4.title: Do you have ORCID?
step4.description: ORCID provides a persistent digital identifier that distinguishes you from every other researcher.

step5.title: Current affiliation
step5.description: We'll suggest research partners and funders based on your current institutional affiliation.
